
# FI0-10648 bug: Saving as draft on PS and NMD journey with invalid values in the Departure transport details section deoes not retain values

# Context

On PS and NMD journeys, when a usser eneters an long string in the Point of destination, more than 101, e.g. `q7N2vX9wL4kP1mR8zB3tY5jS0hG6fD9cA2xB7nV1mQ8wL4kP0zR5tY2jS9hG3fD6cA1xB8nV4mQ0wL7kP2zR5tY8jS3hG1fD4cA9dfsdfsdfsdf7644456`, and then clicks on Save as draft, values are not retained when the user resumes the journey saved after “Saving the draft”.  This is for transport types, this is the url for vessel `add-transportation-details-container-vessel` for NMD and `what-export-destination` for PS.

## Steps to Reproduce

### NMD Journey

- Create a new NMD or edit an existing NMD
- Fill in all mandatory fields across all sections
- Navigate to the Departure transport type section
- Enter a value in “Point of destination” exceeding 101 characters (making this field invalid) as per the context above
- Ensure all remaining fields contain valid values
- Click “Save as draft.”
- Reopen the NMD and revisit the Departure transport type section to verify which values have been retained, e.g. `create-non-manipulation-document/GBR-2026-SD-D98B781F0/add-transportation-details-container-vessel`

### PS Journey

- Create a new PS
- Fill in all mandatory fields across all sections
- Navigate to the `what-export-destination` section
- Enter a value in “Point of destination” exceeding 101 characters (making this field invalid) as per the context above
- Ensure all remaining fields contain valid values  
- Click “Save as draft.”
- Reopen the PS and revisit the `what-export-destination` section to verify which values have been retained
## Actual Result

No values are retained in the Departure transport info page, including fields that contained valid inputs

## Acceptance Criteria

## Senario 1

- Only the invalid values should be removed when saving as a draft, other fields should be retained
- All valid values should remain visible when the user resumes the journey 
saved after “Saving the draft” and therefore should be rettained
- Update tests where and as appropriate to reflect the above ACs

## Scenario 2 
Go through all the pages listed below we need to ensure that when a user saves as draft with invalid values on fields that we provide validation for on save and continue button click, then the value must no be retained and the field should be cleared

**NMD Journey Pages**
- Exporter details page
- Product details
- All transport modes arriving into the UK
- Add storage facility details
- All transport modes leaving the UK

**PS Journey Pages**
- Exporter details page
- Processed product details
- Processing plant ID
- Export health certificate
- Export destination
